title: Oligoron longifolium
taxonomy: Oligoron longifolium belongs to the family of flowering plants known as Fabaceae. More specifically, it falls under the subfamily Faboideae and the tribe Galegeae. Within the tribe, it is classified as a member of the genus Oligon. The genus Oligon is further categorized under the subfamily Faboideae, which is part of the larger family Fabaceae. However, the exact classification might be subject to revision based on ongoing taxonomic research.
